multiple_choice: Exactly one correct answer. This should be the label of the correct option, e.g. 'A', 'B', 'C', 'D', or 'E'.
item_matching: Use 5 items in listA and 7 items in listB to allow for distractors.
short_answer: Use exactly two parts labeled a and b.
Each part must have a non-empty prompt.
At most one part may use sub_questions; the other part should be a direct prompt.
If sub_questions are used, there must be exactly three labeled i, ii, iii (no more and no less).
If short_answer.parts[*].sub_questions are used, each item must be an object shaped as: {"label": "i", "text": "...", "marks": 2}.
Provide marking_points and a marking_scheme for grading.
long_answer: IMPORTANT: The description must never include the answer or solution content.
Set description as setup/context only and task.prompt as the instruction only.
Do not repeat the same wording between description and task.prompt.
If task.sub_questions is not empty, labels must be sequential (a, b, c, ...) and marks must sum to the total question marks.
If long_answer.task.sub_questions are used, each item must be an object shaped as: {"label": "a", "prompt": "...", "marks": 5}.
